intent: Reach for this to offer a choice the child taps to answer, showing correct/wrong/selected/focused state on a number, word, or icon.
avoidWhen: Not for a bare digit shown for reading with no answer-choice framing; use `number-card`.
useWhen: A tappable answer card holding a number, text, or icon child plus an optional small label, with correct/wrong/selected/focused states and a state badge.

footprint._note: counting.tsx defaults width=152 height=104; main glyph PrimitiveLabel fontSize=42 (>=36); secondary label fontSize=20 is a modifier, not the load-bearing read.

intent: Show >, <, or = between two quantities to compare them, optionally as a hungry-mouth glyph or hidden behind a ? until revealed.
avoidWhen: Not for the = inside a built-out number sentence; use `equation-strip`'s operator tile.
useWhen: Places a comparison glyph between two sets with formal or mouth style; revealed=false hides it behind a dashed ? card until the reveal beat.

footprint._note: counting.tsx default size=84 (scale base); glyph fontSize=78, hidden-state ? fontSize=40 — both >=36.

intent: Prove a bundled ten still holds ten ones — fade the wrap to a ghost and reveal the inner sticks — to defuse the 'a ten is just one thing now' misconception.
avoidWhen: Not for ten ones BECOMING one ten (the wrap drawing on); use `bundle-wrap`, or `asset-morph` for the cleaner FX-masked swap.
useWhen: xrayProgress fades the wrap band to a faint outline and reveals the count inner sticks living inside, with optional highlight on the ones.

footprint._note: no readable text — sticks are the content; demoProps stickLength=120 count=10 → ~220 wide × ~170 tall; default stickLength=150 scales larger. minFontPx=36 floor (no glyph).

intent: Show one cute countable thing (fish, star, fruit) to populate a counting or comparison set, with selected/dimmed states.
avoidWhen: Not for abstract place-value units or sticks; use `unit-block` or `small-stick`.
useWhen: A single themed countable in one of six variants with an optional name label; size scales it and selected/dimmed mark its state in a set.

footprint._note: counting.tsx default size=96 (scale = size/100, body drawn in a ~100-unit box); optional label only — minFontPx=36 floor.

intent: Show 'each next number is one more' on a single-rod bead counter (计数器) where pulling one more bead grows the count by exactly one for a 1→N count-up.
avoidWhen: Not for place-value tens/ones (use `place-value-mat`), a ten-fill grid (use `ten-frame-rod`), or a fixed decorative abacus (use the abacus `icon-asset`).
useWhen: count (0..capacity) drives the value readout; the newest bead slides into its seat via revealProgress and swells a ring via activePulse so one more bead and a bigger number are one beat. Horizontal or vertical.

footprint._note: demoProps rodLength=520 + beadRadius giving ~560 wide; value readout size=max(44, r*1.9)=57 at r=30 (>=36); height ~140 with the readout.

intent: Mark the running count at each step of a counting sequence with a small circular badge that pops and fades in via progress.
avoidWhen: Not for a running total with a unit label (use `step-tally`) or tracking a position on a line (use `number-line-track`).
useWhen: A small circular badge carrying the current count value; progress pops and fades it in to punctuate one step of the walk.

footprint._note: counting.tsx default size=56; number label fontSize=size*0.62=34.7px < 36 at default — raised to 36 floor; render at size>=58 to clear it natively.

intent: Lay out a horizontal number sentence (left op right = result) with an optional active or blank tile to spotlight a missing term.
avoidWhen: Not for a part-whole split rather than an arithmetic sentence; use `fen-he-diagram` or `part-whole-brace`.
useWhen: Renders a row of term/operator tiles on a card; activeIndex highlights one tile and blankIndex empties one to pose the missing-term question.

footprint._note: 5 tiles × tileWidth 74 + 4 gaps × 12 + 28 padding ≈ 446; height 78 + 24 = 102; term fontSize=38, operator 34 — load-bearing term >=36.

intent: Reach for this to show a whole splitting into two parts — or two parts composing into a whole — when the part-whole RELATIONSHIP is the point (分合式).
avoidWhen: Not for plain counting or for comparing two quantities — use a CountableObject set or a paired-column compare.
useWhen: Renders the 分合式 bracket with identity-preserving anchors so the same objects flow between whole and parts. Pass the whole and each part as children.

footprint._note: demoProps diagramWidth=220; part NumberCards sized diagramWidth*0.36 → glyph ~60px (>=36); height ~200 spanning whole + two part cards.

intent: Name what is on screen with a centered word or phrase that fades in via progress, with an optional draw-on underline.
avoidWhen: Not for a hand-drawn teacher annotation pointing at a target; use `teacher-mark`.
useWhen: Drops a centered text label with fade or write-on appearance and an optional underline; progress reveals it to caption the current beat.

footprint._note: counting.tsx default fontSize=48; designW from approxTextWidth ≈ 4 chars × 48 × 0.62 ≈ 120 per word, ~240 for a short phrase; minFontPx=48 (the text IS the content).

intent: Show a single digit or short value on a rounded card with correct/wrong/selected states for reading or building a number.
avoidWhen: Not when the value is an answer choice carrying an icon or label; use `answer-tile`.
useWhen: Renders a value (or a blank line) on a rounded card, auto-sizing the glyph from the card's short side so the digit always insets cleanly at any width.

footprint._note: counting.tsx defaults width=92 height=112; glyph = shortSide*0.56 = 51.5px (>=36); two-digit ratio 0.46 = 42px.

intent: Show position, ticks, and animated arc jumps along a min-to-max number line with a current-value badge.
avoidWhen: Not for counting discrete objects with no linear scale; use a `countable-object` set or `stick-group`.
useWhen: Draws a labeled number line with tick marks, point highlights, and animated jump arcs between values; current marks the live position.

footprint._note: counting.tsx default width=560 height=88; badge/highlight labels render at fontSize=18 < 36 — raised to 36 floor; the line + position is the primary read, badge numbers are secondary.

intent: Mark a POSITION (序数) not a quantity with a label whose colored prefix (第 or any locale prefix) is visually distinct from the digit beside it.
avoidWhen: Not for a bare cardinal with one fill (use `number-card`); the whole walk-the-row, spotlight-the-Nth ordinal beat is `ordered-row-spotlight`; an icon answer choice is `answer-tile`.
useWhen: A NumberCard surface carrying a caller-supplied prefix glyph in a separate prefixColor/prefixWeight beside the value digit, with selected/focused/correct/wrong states.

footprint._note: counting.tsx defaults width=132 height=112; value = shortSide*0.56 = 62.7px, prefix 0.74× = 46px — both >=36.

intent: Bracket a span as one whole or one part with a curly brace that reveals via progress, in any of four directions with an optional label.
avoidWhen: Not for the numeric whole/parts relationship itself; use `fen-he-diagram`.
useWhen: Draws a curly brace spanning a width in the up/down/left/right direction; progress reveals it and an optional label names the bracketed span.

footprint._note: demoProps width=180; brace depth = clamp(width*0.16, 24..42); optional label fontSize=22 < 36 — raised to 36 floor (the brace shape, not the label, is the content).

intent: Reach for this to bridge a ten-bundle-plus-loose-ones to the DIGITS of a numeral, by seating contents in labeled tens/ones (and optional hundreds) columns.
avoidWhen: Not for bare countables or a plain ten-structure with no column/digit framing — use a CountableObject set or TenFrameRod.
useWhen: Lays out columns under headers with a divider and an optional written digit per column; pass a child or perColumnCount per column and highlightColumn to focus one.

footprint._note: default columnWidth=180 × 2 columns = 360 wide; height=220; written digit = min(72, digitHeight*0.78)=72px (>=36); header label min(26,...) is a column tag, secondary.

intent: Split one filled round region (a cookie/disk) into N equal parts to teach halves/thirds/quarters, shading one part or pulling parts out to share.
avoidWhen: Not for decomposing a NUMBER into addends (use `fen-he-diagram`) or bracketing a linear span (use `part-whole-brace`) — this divides a continuous area, not a count.
useWhen: cutProgress draws the cuts on, highlightPart shades one part, and separation pulls the parts apart to hand each out; optional 1/N labels.

footprint._note: default radius=90 → 180 diameter; 1/N fraction labels render at radius*0.3 = 27px < 36 — raised to 36 floor; render radius>=120 to clear it natively.

intent: Show one counting stick with idle/active/counted highlight, rotation, and scale — the unit for stick counting and bundling.
avoidWhen: Not for placing many sticks at once; use `stick-group`, which lays out and highlights them for you.
useWhen: A single stick whose highlight state (idle/active/counted) recolors it as it is counted; length, thickness, rotation, and scale shape it.

footprint._note: counting.tsx defaults length=120 thickness=18; no text — minFontPx=36 floor (the stick is the content).

intent: Show the running total as a numeric pill or a row of dots, with an optional unit label, popping in via progress.
avoidWhen: Not for marking just the current step with no total; use `count-step-indicator`.
useWhen: Renders the total as a numeric pill or a dot row; progress pops it in and an optional unit label (e.g. 个) sits beside the number.

footprint._note: default size=64; numeric total fontSize=size*0.62=39.7px (>=36); unit label size*0.42=26.9px is a secondary modifier; dots variant widens with step count.

intent: Lay out N counting sticks in a scatter, row, or bundle with per-index active highlight and reveal-up-to for counting and bundling.
avoidWhen: Not for a single stick or a non-stick countable; use `small-stick` or `countable-object`.
useWhen: Places count sticks in scatter/row/bundle layout; activeIndex highlights the one being counted and revealUpTo reveals them progressively.

footprint._note: default stickLength=120 thickness=18 rowGap=130 scatterRadius=220; a row of ~5 spans ~320 wide, scatter/bundle vary; demoProps wraps in scale(0.42). No text — minFontPx=36 floor.

intent: Fill a 10-cell ten-frame or one-row rod by count to show how many make ten and the ones inside.
avoidWhen: Not for counting loose objects with no ten-structure (use a `countable-object` set) or physical stick bundling (use `stick-group` plus `bundle-wrap`).
useWhen: Fills a two-row ten-frame or one-row rod by count or by colored segments; ones marks the loose units beyond a filled ten.

footprint._note: default size=34, frame=5 cols×2 rows → width 5*34+4*4=186, height 2*34+4=72; demoProps size 28-30 → ~178 wide. No readable digit (filled cells/dots) — minFontPx=36 floor.

intent: Show 1-10 place-value units as cubes, dots, chips, or a segmented rod, optionally stacked, with a value label.
avoidWhen: Not for cute themed countables (use `countable-object`) or a structured ten-frame (use `ten-frame-rod`).
useWhen: Renders count units in cube/dot/chip/rod form, optionally stacked, with an optional numeric value label beneath the group.

footprint._note: default size=32 per cell, ~4 cells → ~160 wide; value label = max(16, size*0.45) = 16px at default size < 36 — raised to 36 floor; render size>=80 for a legible value.
